languages.original_text: "I have a great many of them, and most possess rather esoteric functions that are difficult to explain to a layperson. The most obvious is the galvanic cell." {n}The Tech-Priest slaps his metal belly, which lets out a hollow rumble.{/n} "My hull is quite heavy, so it is supported by a gravitic core. Mechadendrites, of course; an alembic with an alchemical synthesiser; auxiliary cogitators; an eye with magnifiers and analysers, a respiratory—"

languages.text: "Их великое множество и большинство из них обладают довольно эзотерическими функциями, которые сложно объяснить мирян{mf|ину|ке}. Самый очевидный — гальваническая батарея". {n}Техножрец гулко хлопает по металлическому животу.{/n} "Мой корпус весьма увесист, так что его поддерживает антигравитационное ядро. Естественно, {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}мехадендриты{/g}, алембик с алхимическим синтезатором, вспомогательные когитаторы, око с магнификаторами и анализаторами, дыхательный..."

"I have a great many of them, and most possess rather esoteric functions that are difficult to explain to a layperson. The most obvious is the galvanic cell." {n}The Tech-Priest slaps his metal belly, which lets out a hollow rumble.{/n} "My hull is quite heavy, so it is supported by a gravitic core. {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}Mechadendrites{/g}, of course; an alembic with an alchemical synthesiser; auxiliary cogitators; an eye with magnifiers and analysers, a respiratory—"

languages.text: «Tengo una gran cantidad de ellos, y la mayoría cuenta con funciones más bien esotéricas que resulta difícil explicar a los laicos. El más evidente es la célula galvánica». {n}El tecnosacerdote se da una palmada en el vientre metálico, que resuena como si estuviese hueco.{/n} «Mi caparazón es bastante pesado, por lo que también utilizo un núcleo gravitatorio para aliviarlo. Luego están las {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mecadendritas{/g}, por supuesto; un alambique con sintetizador alquímico, cogitadores auxiliares, un ojo con lupas y analizadores, un refuerzo respiratorio...».
languages.original_text: "I have a great many of them, and most possess rather esoteric functions that are difficult to explain to a layperson. The most obvious is the galvanic cell." {n}The Tech-Priest slaps his metal belly, which lets out a hollow rumble.{/n} "My hull is quite heavy, so it is supported by a gravitic core. {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}Mechadendrites{/g}, of course; an alembic with an alchemical synthesiser; auxiliary cogitators; an eye with magnifiers and analysers, a respiratory—"

traits.locale_text: «Tengo una gran cantidad de ellos, y la mayoría cuenta con funciones más bien esotéricas que resulta difícil explicar a los laicos. El más evidente es la célula galvánica». {n}El tecnosacerdote se da una palmada en el vientre metálico, que resuena como si estuviese hueco.{/n} «Mi caparazón es bastante pesado, por lo que también utilizo un núcleo gravitatorio para aliviarlo. Luego están las {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mecadendritas{/g}, por supuesto; un alambique con sintetizador alquímico, cogitadores auxiliares, un ojo con lupas y analizadores, un refuerzo respiratorio...».

languages.text: “我装了许多植入物，而且大多数功能相当高深，难以向教外人士解释。最直观的就是这块原电池。”{n}技术神甫拍了拍自己的金属腹部，发出空洞的嗡鸣。{/n}“我的躯壳相当厚重，所以内部装了重力核心来支撑。当然还有{g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}机械触须{/g}、一台带有炼金合成器的蒸馏器、辅助沉思者、一只集成了放大镜和分析仪的眼睛，以及一个呼吸系统——”
languages.original_text: "I have a great many of them, and most possess rather esoteric functions that are difficult to explain to a layperson. The most obvious is the galvanic cell." {n}The Tech-Priest slaps his metal belly, which lets out a hollow rumble.{/n} "My hull is quite heavy, so it is supported by a gravitic core. {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}Mechadendrites{/g}, of course; an alembic with an alchemical synthesiser; auxiliary cogitators; an eye with magnifiers and analysers, a respiratory—"

traits.locale_text: “我装了许多植入物，而且大多数功能相当高深，难以向教外人士解释。最直观的就是这块原电池。”{n}技术神甫拍了拍自己的金属腹部，发出空洞的嗡鸣。{/n}“我的躯壳相当厚重，所以内部装了重力核心来支撑。当然还有{g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}机械触须{/g}、一台带有炼金合成器的蒸馏器、辅助沉思者、一只集成了放大镜和分析仪的眼睛，以及一个呼吸系统——”

languages.text: « J'en ai un très grand nombre, la plupart aux fonctions ésotériques difficiles à expliquer aux profanes. La plus évidente est ma cellule galvanique. » {n}Le technoprêtre tapote de la main son ventre en métal, qui laisse échapper un grondement sourd.{/n} « Mon enveloppe étant lourde, elle est soutenue par un noyau gravitique. J'ai des {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mécadendrites{/g}, bien sûr ; un alambic avec synthétiseur alchimique ; des cogitateurs auxiliaires ; un œil doté de loupes et d'analyseurs, un respirateur... »
languages.original_text: "I have a great many of them, and most possess rather esoteric functions that are difficult to explain to a layperson. The most obvious is the galvanic cell." {n}The Tech-Priest slaps his metal belly, which lets out a hollow rumble.{/n} "My hull is quite heavy, so it is supported by a gravitic core. {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}Mechadendrites{/g}, of course; an alembic with an alchemical synthesiser; auxiliary cogitators; an eye with magnifiers and analysers, a respiratory—"

traits.locale_text: « J'en ai un très grand nombre, la plupart aux fonctions ésotériques difficiles à expliquer aux profanes. La plus évidente est ma cellule galvanique. » {n}Le technoprêtre tapote de la main son ventre en métal, qui laisse échapper un grondement sourd.{/n} « Mon enveloppe étant lourde, elle est soutenue par un noyau gravitique. J'ai des {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mécadendrites{/g}, bien sûr ; un alambic avec synthétiseur alchimique ; des cogitateurs auxiliaires ; un œil doté de loupes et d'analyseurs, un respirateur... »

languages.text: "Davon habe ich reichlich, und die meisten verfügen über recht esoterische Funktionen, die man Laien nur schwer erklären kann. Die offensichtlichste von allen ist die galvanische Zelle." {n}Der Techpriester schlägt sich auf den metallenen Bauch und erzeugt ein hohles Dröhnen.{/n} "Mein Rumpf ist recht schwer und wird durch einen Gravitationskern gestützt. {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}Mechadendriten{/g}, natürlich. Ein Alambic mit einem alchemischen Synthesizer. Hilfscogitatoren. Ein Auge mit Makrofunktion und Analysatoren, ein respiratorisches ..."
languages.original_text: "I have a great many of them, and most possess rather esoteric functions that are difficult to explain to a layperson. The most obvious is the galvanic cell." {n}The Tech-Priest slaps his metal belly, which lets out a hollow rumble.{/n} "My hull is quite heavy, so it is supported by a gravitic core. {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}Mechadendrites{/g}, of course; an alembic with an alchemical synthesiser; auxiliary cogitators; an eye with magnifiers and analysers, a respiratory—"

Ein Alambic mit einem alchemischen Synthesizer. Hilfscogitatoren. Ein Auge mit Makrofunktion und Analysatoren, ein respiratorisches ..."

languages.text: 「そのほとんどは、素人には説明しにくい難解な機能を持っている。最もわかりやすいのはガルバニック電池だ」。{n}テックプリーストは金属製の腹を叩き、空虚な音を響かせる。{/n}「私の船体はかなり重いので、反重力コアで支えています。メカデンドライトはもちろん、錬金術合成機を備えたアレンビック、補助コギテーター、拡大鏡と分析装置を備えた眼球、呼吸器......」。
languages.original_text: "I have a great many of them, and most possess rather esoteric functions that are difficult to explain to a layperson. The most obvious is the galvanic cell." {n}The Tech-Priest slaps his metal belly, which lets out a hollow rumble.{/n} "My hull is quite heavy, so it is supported by an anti-gravity core. Mechadendrites, of course; an alembic with an alchemical synthesiser; auxiliary cogitators; an eye with magnifiers and analysers, a respiratory—"

languages.text: "Bende çok ogment var, çoğu da avama açıklaması zor ezoterik işlevlere sahip. En bariz olanı galvaniz hücredir." {n}Tekno Rahip, metal göbeğine hafifçe vuruyor. Ardından göbeğinden boğuk bir gümbürtü çıkıyor.{/n} "Gövdem oldukça ağır, bu yüzden yer çekimsel çekirdekle destekleniyor. Elbette {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mekadentritlerim{/g}, simyasal sentezleyiciye sahip bir imbiğim, yardımcı kavramsayarlarım, büyüteçleri ve analizcileri olan bir gözüm, solunum..."
